Lyrics.text:
1. Arovy ny fanahinay,
Andriamanitra!
Tariho ny fanahinay (in-2)
Hanaraka Anao. (in-3)
2. Hianao no hiankinanay,
Fa tsara Hianao;
Ka mamelà ny helokay (in-2)
Fa diso izahay. (in-3)
3. lzahay hiantso Anao,
Andriamanitra!
Ka henoy ny fivavaka (in-2)
Ataonay Aminao. (in-3)
4. Mitsinjova ny mpanota
Mahantra indrindra,
Fa Jeso, Ilay Mpanavotra (in-2)
No maty nisolo. (in-3)
